measurements.claim: The twenty-first-wave packet expands the active outreach queue only across YouTube, Reddit, and social/blog surfaces while keeping funding and new GitHub work out of scope.
evidence: TWENTY-FIRST-WAVE-SOCIAL-BLOG-COMMENT-EXPANSION-2026-07-02.md purpose states YouTube, Reddit, and social/blog outreach
the purpose states funding and new GitHub work remain out of scope unless an active reply, review, CI failure, or maintainer request needs response

measurements.claim: The packet includes exact, non-identical comment drafts for 6 Reddit targets, 7 YouTube targets, and 8 social/blog targets with URLs and reasons.
evidence: Reddit targets R20-R25 include URL, reason, and text
YouTube targets Y21-Y27 include URL, reason, and text
Blog/social targets B7-B14 include URL, reason, and text
drafts vary by target and do not duplicate the same comment

measurements.claim: The packet explicitly marks public posting as not completed and requires action-time confirmation before representational communication is posted.
evidence: Posting rule says no public comment should be claimed as posted until the public side effect actually completes
Posting rule says representational communication still needs action-time confirmation of exact destination and exact text
Posting Confirmation Template requires destinations and exact text

measurements.claim: The packet limits link-bearing outreach to one self-promotion-thread comment and recommends an initial no-link first run.
evidence: Current Social Posture says prefer no-link comments unless the target explicitly asks for tools, repos, examples, or self-promotion
R24 is the only target-specific comment containing https://github.com/HarperZ9/telos; the other occurrence is the general link policy
Recommended Next Run says start with 8 no-link comments and hold R24 for a self-promotion-specific pass

measurements.claim: The packet records the current browser limitation that Chrome was unavailable and no running browser window was found for authenticated posting.
evidence: Browser state note says Chrome was not available through the Chrome extension backend
Browser state note says Windows Computer Use did not find a running Chrome, Edge, Brave, or browser window
Browser state note says Firefox is installed but not running and the packet advances preparation and validation, not public submission
